title: BMICalculator
description: JSON schema for BMI Calculator inputs and outputs used in SSA health calculators and automation.

value.description: Height value in either inches or centimeters depending on unit.

unit.description: Unit for height. 'in' for inches, 'cm' for centimeters.

value.description: Weight value in either pounds or kilograms depending on unit.

unit.description: Unit for weight. 'lb' for pounds, 'kg' for kilograms.

sex.description: Optional sex field. Used only for contextual messaging; BMI computation itself does not differ by sex.

ageYears.description: Optional age in years. Used for screening notes; BMI computation itself does not differ by age.

unitSystem.description: Preferred display unit system for results. Does not change the underlying BMI formula.

bmiDecimals.description: Number of decimal places to show for BMI.

weightDecimals.description: Number of decimal places to show for recommended weight range.

autosaveProfile.description: When true, SSA may persist BMI input as part of a health profile.

allowLinkToMacroCalculator.description: When true, BMI results may be passed as context to the Macro Calculator node.

bmi.description: Computed Body Mass Index (BMI) using standard formula (kg/m^2).

category.description: BMI category based on numeric BMI value (WHO-style breakpoints).

categoryLabel.description: Human-friendly label for the BMI category (e.g., 'Underweight', 'Normal weight', 'Overweight', 'Obesity Class I').

min.description: Lower bound of weight corresponding to BMI 18.5 at the given height (in the unit specified by 'unit').

max.description: Upper bound of weight corresponding to BMI 24.9 at the given height (in the unit specified by 'unit').

unit.description: Unit used for the recommended weight boundaries.

warnings.description: Non-blocking warnings relevant to BMI interpretation (e.g., athletes, pregnancy, children).

notes.description: Informational notes about BMI and its limitations that can be displayed under the result.

meta.title: BMICalculatorMeta
meta.description: Optional metadata for debugging, analytics, or SSA orchestration.

calculatorId.description: Internal id for this calculator run, if the runtime wants to stamp one.

nodeId.description: Planning Graph node id for this calculator.

generatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this output was generated.
